tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: A version of Chunky by Bruno Mars including some cool jazzy chords.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
[ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]         [ch]Em7[/ch]
When the world is on your shoulder[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Gotta straighten up your act and boogie on[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
If you cant hang with the feelin'[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Em7[/ch]
Then there ain't no room for you this side of town[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em7[/ch]
Cause we're the party people night and day[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em7[/ch]
Livin' crazy that's the only way[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]              [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                            [ch]Bm7[/ch]
So tonight you gotta leave that nine to five up on the shelf[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]
And just enjoy yourself[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]            [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Bm7[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]Gmaj7[/ch] [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
Life Ain't So Bad At    All[/tab]

[tab]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]

Life Ain't So Bad At All (Live Life Off The Wall)
